title: MuslinZ Muslin Cloths for Baby - Baby Burp Cloths - 6 Pack Muslin Squares - Large 70x70cm - Pure Cotton - Soft, Absorbent & Breathable - Multi Use Newborn Cloths - UK Brand (Pink)
features: Quality: Award winning MuslinZ baby muslins are made from premium quality cotton, a 6 pack of large 70x70cm muslin squares, providing a soft and gentle touch for your little one.

Newborn Essential: our 100% pure Cotton Muslin Cloths have so many uses when feeding or caring for your baby. Use as a Baby Burp Cloth, Feeding Cover, Dribble Catcher, Changing Mat Cover. As a Newborn Swaddle, for Swaddle Bathing or as a Reusable Nappy.

Lightweight and Breathable: Our soft baby muslins are lightweight and breathable, ensuring your baby stays comfortable and doesn't overheat. The open-weave design allows for air circulation, making it perfect for use year-round.
MuslinZ brand: Designed in the UK, with a range of exclusive prints, to meet the highest quality and safety. Made with care to Oeko Tex 100 Standard.

Easy to Care For: Our baby muslins are easy to care for, they can be machine washed and are quick to dry. Making them a newborn baby must have for every busy new parent. They are durable, ensuring that it can withstand the wear and tear of everyday use. Buy well - buy once.
description: Product Description Designed in the UK At MuslinZ we found that the muslin squares available were lacking in quality so we decided to design our own. Our muslin's are well known for good quality in the UK and worldwide. Our Classic Muslin Square Essential for all parents and their babies. MuslinZ muslin squares are designed with quality in mind which makes them perfect to use and look great wash after wash. The many features of the MuslinZ muslin are: Machine Washable at 40c - Wash before use Extremely Soft - the more you wash them the softer they get Maintains Shape and Texture - due to the quality fabric Fine Weave - for excellent absorbency and so they are not see through for using as a cover up when feeding 70x70 cm Sizing - a great size for so many uses MuslinZ 6 Pack Multi Purpose Muslin Squares Our classic 100% cotton muslins can be used as newborn reusable cloth nappies, covers for breast feeding, burp cloths, changing mat covers, newborn swaddles and baby comforters MuslinZ Ex Large Muslin Cloths for Baby - Newborn Baby Essentials - Baby Swad... MuslinZ Baby Muslin Squares, Soft, Breathable and Absorbent Newborn Receiving...
